text.title: Market Research: TAM/SAM/SOM Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: DE/AT/CH SMB email-marketing sizing
example.note: Scope: SMB email marketing, geography DE+AT+CH, ICP solo creators <1k subs DE-speaking, ARPU $19. Top-down: EU email-marketing reports (Gartner 2026, Forrester 2025) put EU TAM at $6.8B; scaled by DACH GDP share (18%) = $1.2B. Bottom-up: Eurostat SMB creator count = 21k qualified; ARPU $19/mo * 12 = $228/yr; bottom-up TAM = $4.8M reachable revenue. Delta: TAM (industry, $1.2B) vs reachable TAM (bottom-up, $4.8M) - too large because TAM measures spend, reachable measures revenue capture. Reconciliation paragraph: distinguish industry-wide spend (top-down) from reachable revenue (bottom-up); set SAM = TAM * 20% product-fit share = $240M, SOM = SAM * 2% reach = $4.8M (year-3 ceiling). SOM confidence: medium (reach estimate based on a single creator-panel survey).
